fullstack.title: Full Stack Development
fullstack.description: Build and ship scalable web and mobile applications end-to-end. From responsive frontends with React and Next.js to robust backends with Node.js and .NET, paired with PostgreSQL, SQL Server, or MongoDB — deployed on AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Cross-platform mobile delivery with React Native and Flutter.

blockchain.title: Blockchain Development
blockchain.description: Design and deploy smart contracts and decentralized applications on Ethereum, Polygon, and Base. Experienced with Solidity and Hardhat, from token systems to full blockchain gaming ecosystems.

devops.title: DevOps
devops.description: Streamline development workflows and ensure reliable deployments using Docker, GitHub Actions, and multi-cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

consultant.title: Consultant Service
consultant.description: Partner with founders and product teams to turn ideas into production-ready software. From architecture design and tech stack selection to team building and delivery, I help bring products to market efficiently.
